name: swatchbook-reference
description: DTCG 2025.10 native resolver. Flat token paths organized per `$type` — color, size/space/radius, font, typography, motion, border, shadow, gradient, stroke, number — plus four independent modifiers: `mode` (light/dark baseline), `brand` (default/ACME accent), `typography` (sans/mono/comic base family), and `a11y` (normal/high-contrast border + focus emphasis + base weight, independent of family).

brand.description: Accent palette. `Default` leaves the baseline alone; `ACME` overrides the accent scale.

typography.description: Type-family axis. `Sans` leaves the baseline alone; `Mono` and `Comic` swap the proportional base family.

a11y.description: Border + focus emphasis + base weight. `Normal` leaves the baseline alone; `High-contrast` thickens borders, boosts the focus ring, and bumps the base font weight — never the font-family, which stays whatever the `typography` modifier set.
